title: Senior Financial Analyst - Acuite Ratings - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Acuite Ratings - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Acuite Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Acuite Ratings:
Acuite Ratings is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Acuite Ratings!
